Episode 85 - Cyclocross World Champs, the Phase II Project, and Adam Begins his Waxing Journey

 

What up party people. We’ve got a hot show for y’all this week with loads of random banter including cyclocross worlds, chain waxing, a little bit of tire talk, Alexey Vermeulen’s Phase II Project p/b ENVE announcement, and more. 

 

Hit us up with any feedback or questions for the show at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or you can swipe on over to the Bonk Bros insta and give that follow button a smash (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle @scottmcgilljr). This is usually the part where I mention our Patreon page and beg y’all to head over and throw us some bones, however, today I just wanted to express my gratitude for each of y’all who continue to support the show and give a shout to some of y’all. And I just selected y’all from the pool randomly so Conner, Karol, James, Nathan, Julien, Chuck, Charlotte, and of course everyone’s favorite super fan algorithm Dan. Your dollars are appreciated and noticed and currently going to supporting some behind the scenes updates. Alright that’s all I’ve got for y’all, let’s get this party started.

item.title: The Regurgitation Episode
item.itunes:title: The Regurgitation Episode
item.description:
Episode 84 - The Regurgitation Episode

What up party people. So I dubbed this weeks show the regurgitation episode because it basically seemed like every discussion we had somehow found its way back to topics we’ve covered in the past and by the end, it just felt like a big bag of regurgitated bag of pod talk. But hey, the Bonk Bros banter is what y’all come here for so there’s no shortage of that.

Hit us up with any feedback or questions for the show at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or you can swipe on over to the Bonk Bros insta and give that follow button a smash (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle @scottmcgilljr). item.title: The Big 3 Embarrassment, Tire Talk, New Bike Day, and Did He Just Say Peeing Your Chamois is Cool?
item.itunes:title: The Big 3 Embarrassment, Tire Talk, New Bike Day, and Did He Just Say Peeing Your Chamois is Cool?
item.description:
Episode 83 - The Big 3 Embarrassment, Tire Talk, New Bike Day, and Did He Just Say Peeing Your Chamois is Cool?

What is up party people. Another banger for y’all where we talk about what an embarrassment the Big 3 were during the last round of cyclocross World Cups, a bunch of discussion on various tire topics per usual, Dylan spills the beans on his new bike sponsor, and did someone just say peeing your chamois is cool?

Hit us up with any feedback or questions for the show at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or you can swipe on over to the Bonk Bros insta and give that follow button a smash (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle @scottmcgilljr). We’ve also got a Patreon page for anyone who feels so inclined to throw us a few Washis each month and get you that early access pass. Alright alright let’s get this party started.

item.title: Episode 81 - Non-aero Aero Helmets, GAS, and We Got Punked - At Least We Think So…
item.itunes:title: Episode 81 - Non-aero Aero Helmets, GAS, and We Got Punked - At Least We Think So…
item.description:
What up party people. Shout to one of our listeners for sending in the clip from Family Guy that inspired the party people tag line - it took over a year for someone to finally bridge the connection. I don’t even like Family Guy but that was one of the one-liners I remember and it’s always stuck. So who knows, now that I’m outed, might have to come up with some other way of addressing y’all at the stop or maybe we’ll just stick with it. Anyways, with another slow week in the bike racing world we brought some discussion topics to the table again before diving into some fun listener questions. We’ve got a huge backlog of submissions so if you’ve sent in a burning question that you really want an answer to asap for timing relevancy, make sure to note this early in your question so we can try to get to it on time. 

 

That said, hit us up with any feedback or questions for the show at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or scroll over to the Bonk Bros Instagram page and smash that follow button (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle @scottmcgilljr). Alright alright let’s get this party started. 

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 80 - New Year New Us! or whatever…
item.itunes:title: Episode 80 - New Year New Us! or whatever…
item.description:
What up party people. Happy fricken New Year. How in the world we’re entering our third year of podcast I have no idea but until this things blows up in or face or we finally just get too sick of each other, we’re going to keep this thing rolling. We decided it was about time we add just a liiiitle bit of structure to the madness and each came with a burning topic we wanted to throw on the table for discussion. None of us shared these with each other before so everything is still off the cuff, just enough structure to keep the conversations flowing.

 

Hit us up with any feedback or questions for the show at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or scroll over to the Bonk Bros Instagram page and smash that follow button (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle). Oh yeah, if my audio sucks during this intro I have no excuses other than I packed the wrong adapters for my microphone and I’m recording this from the luxury of my fancy hotel room in Chicago so this is what you get. Alright alright let’s get this thing started. 

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/ 

Listener Question Form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1T37wGRLk6iYTCF6X_DQ9yfcaYtfAQceKpBJYR5W7DVA/edit?ts=642eb6d6

item.itunes:summary:
What up party people. Happy fricken New Year. How in the world we’re entering our third year of podcast I have no idea but until this things blows up in or face or we finally just get too sick of each other, we’re going to keep this thing rolling. We decided it was about time we add just a liiiitle bit of structure to the madness and each came with a burning topic we wanted to throw on the table for discussion. None of us shared these with each other before so everything is still off the cuff, just enough structure to keep the conversations flowing.
Hit us up with any feedback or questions for the show at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or scroll over to the Bonk Bros Instagram page and smash that follow button (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle). Oh yeah, if my audio sucks during this intro I have no excuses other than I packed the wrong adapters for my microphone and I’m recording this from the luxury of my fancy hotel room in Chicago so this is what you get. Alright alright let’s get this thing started.
Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros
For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow
Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/
Listener Question Form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1T37wGRLk6iYTCF6X_DQ9yfcaYtfAQceKpBJYR5W7DVA/edit?ts=642eb6d6

item.title: Episode 79 - The van der Poel Treatment and Scott’s NBD!
item.itunes:title: Episode 79 - The van der Poel Treatment and Scott’s NBD!
item.description:
What up party people. Hope y’all are fitting all the holiday parties in you can this time of year because before you know it, it’ll be 2024 and we’ll be back to the races. Literally. We’ve got a shorter episode for y’all this week as I had an appointment to get to so I had to wrap things up early but if you’re anything like Scott then you’d much rather spend your precious time with family than listen to us buffoons ramble on about mindless crap for more than an hour at a time.   

Hit us up with any feedback or questions for the show at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or at the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle). item.title: Episode 78 - Di2, Aero Hoods, and Gone Golfing
item.itunes:title: Episode 78 - Di2, Aero Hoods, and Gone Golfing
item.description:
What up party people. First off just want to say thanks to all you creatives out there who reached out to offer help with our branding project. It’s super cool to have such a wide pool of listeners that a basic call out in the intro to a show can lead to dozens of y’all hitting us up wanting to help us out. Also, big shout to all of our Patrons and our newest VIP + member, Conner. Y’all continue to stand by our side with not just your listener support but also throwing us some of your hard earned dollars each month and for that we greatly appreciate y’all.

Not much to brief you on this week as the show is completely random but somehow we still talked for well over an hour and got some serious laughs in. Hit us up with any feedback or questions for the show at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or at the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle). Alright alright let’s get this thing started.

item.title: Episode 77 - US CX Nats Breakdown, The Bonk Bros Grande Prix, and Dizzle’s SO TALENTED
item.itunes:title: Episode 77 - US CX Nats Breakdown, The Bonk Bros Grande Prix, and Dizzle’s SO TALENTED
item.description:
What up party people. Dizzle had the ride of his life at the US cyclocross nationals this weekend, okay maybe not quite but a good ride nonetheless, and we get him in the hot seat to break the whole thing down. We also banter on about plenty of tire questions and then get into an interesting proposition from one of the fans who suggested we start a Grand Prix, or as I like to think of it as, the Bonk Bros Grande Prix. Let’s hear what y’all think, is this something we should consider tossing up into the ether to see whether it sticks? Hit us up with your thoughts and any other questions for the show at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or at the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle). The show page is only a few followers away from exceeding my personal follower count so get over there and give the show a following so I can finally throw in the social media towel and abandon the platform once and for all. Well, probably not really but you catch my drift. 

Big shout to all of our trusty Patreon supporters for helping us pay the bills. Yes, this may be a free show for most but that doesn’t mean there ain’t behind the scenes expenses, plenty of them for that matter. With that I want to give a special shout to a couple of our newest supporters, Julien and Matt, for coming out swinging with some big monthly support. If you too want to throw a few coins in the ol’ Bonk Bros piggy bank, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). 

One last thing, we’re working on a little Bonk Bros media makeover and we’re at the point where it’s time to bring in some professional assistance with a few things. If you work or have experience in the graphic or creative design space, branding, marketing, etc and want the chance to work with your favorite podcasters to refresh some things hit us up. We’re not looking for hand outs so don’t think we’re expecting pro-bono work here, it’d just be rad to work with someone who actually knows the show rather than some no-name Jane off Upwork who tries to turn our branding into some fairyland express. Alright alright let’s get this thing started. 

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/ 

Listener Question Form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1T37wGRLk6iYTCF6X_DQ9yfcaYtfAQceKpBJYR5W7DVA/edit?ts=642eb6d6

item.title: Episode 76 - Cyclocross Nationals Preview and Dylan’s Off The Pathfinder Sauce
item.itunes:title: Episode 76 - Cyclocross Nationals Preview and Dylan’s Off The Pathfinder Sauce
item.description:
What up party people, or whatever the hell Dylan wants to call all of y’all since he’s apparently too kosher drinking his  kombucha while grazing his garden to actually know what a good time is. Right off the bat we settle the debate from last week about talent once and for all but don’t worry, I set a time limit on the discussion this week so if your eyes glazed over when Drew mentioned talent wasn’t a thing last week, just skip forward 10 or 12 min and you’ll be on your merry way with the usual Bonk Bros banter about things like the demise of cyclocross, what actually is a gran fondo, some listener questions, and Dylan shares his latest love in the world of gravel tires. 

If you have any questions for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit up the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle). And if you’ll be at cyclocross Nationals this weekend make sure to give Dizzle all the filthy heckles you can muster. Alright alright let’s get this thing started. 

 

Big shout to all our Patreon supporters for helping us pay the bills. If you too want to throw a few coins in the ol’ Bonk Bros piggy bank, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). 

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 75 - BWR Mexico and Mystery Episode w/ Adam Roberge
item.itunes:title: Episode 75 - BWR Mexico and Mystery Episode w/ Adam Roberge
item.description:
What up party people. After a 74 episode hot streak, I had to miss the recording this week because I had some family matters to tend to but the guys assured me they had things under control. To be honest, I actually haven’t listened to the episode yet at the time of recording this intro so the rest of the show is as much of a mystery to me as it is you. So I don’t have much more to add here for now. If you have any questions for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit up the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle). It’s been really cool to see a bunch of y’all sharing your Spotify season highlights with us and how many of y’all actually dig the show. If it weren’t for all the support from y’all we’d probably have kicked this podcast thing to the curb a long time ago but knowing this is actually something y’all look forward to each week is motivation enough. Oh and one more thing, big shout to one of our trusty Patrons who was absolutely on top of their early access game last week and hit me up about a mixing error that snuck it’s way into the edit so I was able to go back and correct it before releasing to the masses a few hours later. So if you too want early access to the show each week (hopefully in better condition than last week) then drop kick that Patreon link in the show notes and sign up for as little as $5/month. Alright alright let’s get this party started. 

 

Big shout to all our Patreon supporters for helping us pay the bills. If you too want to throw a few coins in the ol’ Bonk Bros piggy bank, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). 

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

It’s been really cool to see a bunch of y’all sharing your Spotify season highlights with us and how many of y’all actually dig the show. If it weren’t for all the support from y’all we’d probably have kicked this podcast thing to the curb a long time ago but knowing this is actually something y’all look forward to each week is motivation enough. Oh and one more thing, big shout to one of our trusty Patrons who was absolutely on top of their early access game last week and hit me up about a mixing error that snuck it’s way into the edit so I was able to go back and correct it before releasing to the masses a few hours later. So if you too want early access to the show each week (hopefully in better condition than last week) then drop kick that Patreon link in the show notes and sign up for as little as $5/month. Alright alright let’s get this party started.
Big shout to all our Patreon supporters for helping us pay the bills. If you too want to throw a few coins in the ol’ Bonk Bros piggy bank, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros).
Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/ Listener Question Form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1T37wGRLk6iYTCF6X_DQ9yfcaYtfAQceKpBJYR5W7DVA/edit?ts=642eb6d6

item.title: Episode 72 - Iceman is the OG Spirit and No 2024 Life Time Grand Prix Showdown?!
item.itunes:title: Episode 72 - Iceman is the OG Spirit and No 2024 Life Time Grand Prix Showdown?!
item.description:
What is up party people. First off just want to give a big shout to all the fans of the podcast I ran into this past weekend at Iceman. If Iceman isn’t the true spirit of bike racing then man, I don’t know what is. It’s always cool to meet and hear from y’all in person so I appreciate all the shouts and feedback. I still can’t believe people still tune in each week to listen to us numbskulls banter about random topics but hey, we’re just giving the people what they want I guess. We talk Iceman drama, Cyclocross PanAm champs, and of course, Dizzle getting snubbed by Life Time for the Grand Prix selection next year, with loads of opinions on the topic.

 

If you have any questions or feedback for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle). Alright let’s get this party started. 

 

Big shout of appreciation to our Patreon supporters for helping us keep the mics on. If you want to throw your favorite podcasters a few bones, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). And if you want a sick Bonk Bros dad hat, hit up the link in the show notes (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). 

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/ 

Listener Question Form: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1T37wGRLk6iYTCF6X_DQ9yfcaYtfAQceKpBJYR5W7DVA/edit?ts=642eb6d6

item.title: Episode 71 - It Was The Bonk Bros Bash, It Was a Gravel Smash
item.itunes:title: Episode 71 - It Was The Bonk Bros Bash, It Was a Gravel Smash
item.description:
What is up party people. We recorded this episode on Halloween and figured what better way to get in the spirit than come in our finest costume attire. Of course, Dylan was too cool to join in the fun but the rest of us, well you’re just going to have to tune in to find out who and what we came as. Since DJ missed the episode last week, we give him some air time to talk about his race from Big Sugar and tell us all about his wicked moves on the gravel rave dance floor, before we get into listener questions and who knows what. Like we mentioned last week, we’re working on revamping things a bit this off season to hopefully bring you better content and more offerings for years to come. We’re also looking to take the show on the road more often next season so if you want to see the Bonk Bros at a race near you, let us know and we’ll see what kinda magic we can pull.

 

If you have any questions or feedback for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle). 

 

Big shout of appreciation to our Patreon supporters for helping us keep the mics on. If you want to throw your favorite podcasters a few bones, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). And if you want a sick Bonk Bros dad hat, hit up the link in the show notes (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). item.title: Episode 70 - Big Sugar Breakdown w/ Kerry Werner and SCOTT IS BACK!
item.itunes:title: Episode 70 - Big Sugar Breakdown w/ Kerry Werner and SCOTT IS BACK!
item.description:
What is up my party people. I wasn’t able to make it down for Big Sugar this past weekend but the rest of the crew was all together and sounded like quite the time. From the Bonk Bros Q&A session at the expo, to crazy war stories from within the bunch, and the gravel rave after party, last weekend sounded off the hook. Big shout to Tyler for conducted another full day of live race updates on the Bonk Bros insta, if you want to see more of Tyler’s live commentary next year be sure to send some postcards to our friends at ESPN to get him in the hot seat for all the gravel coverage they’ll be doing next season. Okay okay maybe ESPN is a little bit of a reach but hey, gotta dream big right? In all seriousness, the action from this past weekend sparked some ideas in our heads for how we can bring the podcast on the road to some fun events next season so if you want to see your favorite podcasters at an event near you next season, have your people contact our people and we’ll see what we can make happen. Anywho, we’ve got Kerry Werner back with us this week and even get a special appearance from fan favorite mystery host Scott, so tune in for some fun conversations. Unfortunately, Dylan came down with some sort of bug this week so wasn’t able to make the recording, so we wish him the best of luck with his recovery so he can hopefully be back behind the mic in no time.

 

If you have any questions or feedback for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle @kerryw24). We actually just started to implement some form of organization to how we compile all the questions that come in from y’all so hopefully they won’t get lost in the ether again. No guarantees on how timely we’ll be with answering them but hey, we’ll do our best. Alright, let’s get this party started.

 

Big shout of appreciation to our Patreon supporters for helping us keep the mics on. If you want to throw your favorite podcasters a few bones, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). And if you want a sick Bonk Bros dad hat, hit up the link in the show notes (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). Alright let’s get this party started. 

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.itunes:summary:
What is up my party people. I wasn’t able to make it down for Big Sugar this past weekend but the rest of the crew was all together and sounded like quite the time. From the Bonk Bros Q&A session at the expo, to crazy war stories from within the bunch, and the gravel rave after party, last weekend sounded off the hook. Big shout to Tyler for conducted another full day of live race updates on the Bonk Bros insta, if you want to see more of Tyler’s live commentary next year be sure to send some postcards to our friends at ESPN to get him in the hot seat for all the gravel coverage they’ll be doing next season. Okay okay maybe ESPN is a little bit of a reach but hey, gotta dream big right? In all seriousness, the action from this past weekend sparked some ideas in our heads for how we can bring the podcast on the road to some fun events next season so if you want to see your favorite podcasters at an event near you next season, have your people contact our people and we’ll see what we can make happen. Anywho, we’ve got Kerry Werner back with us this week and even get a special appearance from fan favorite mystery host Scott, so tune in for some fun conversations. Unfortunately, Dylan came down with some sort of bug this week so wasn’t able to make the recording, so we wish him the best of luck with his recovery so he can hopefully be back behind the mic in no time.
If you have any questions or feedback for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle @kerryw24). We actually just started to implement some form of organization to how we compile all the questions that come in from y’all so hopefully they won’t get lost in the ether again. No guarantees on how timely we’ll be with answering them but hey, we’ll do our best. Alright, let’s get this party started.
Big shout of appreciation to our Patreon supporters for helping us keep the mics on. If you want to throw your favorite podcasters a few bones, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). And if you want a sick Bonk Bros dad hat, hit up the link in the show notes (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). Alright let’s get this party started.
Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros
For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 69 - The Big Showdown Preview w/ Kerry Werner
item.itunes:title: Episode 69 - The Big Showdown Preview w/ Kerry Werner
item.description:
What up party people. When we started this thing I never thought we’d see the episode count reach 69 but here we are. And what better timing the the week we’ve all been waiting months for. The big showdown between our very own Andrew Dizzle Dillman and Dylan DJ Johnson is finally here. Who will conquer and come out on top, or likely around 17th, only time will tell. Thankfully, we’ll have our chief correspondent on the grounds to cover the action live for y’all so be sure to tune into the Bonk Bros live updates from Big Sugar presented by Tyler Cloutier. In case you missed the coverage from Little Sugar last weekend, Tyler is basically a pro commentator, videographer, navigator, and whatever else is needed to capture bike racing in the heat of the moment so we know he’ll bring the heat this Saturday.

Also, the boys will be doing a LIVE tire talk session at the Big Sugar expo Friday afternoon at the Ignition booth around 2p so add it to your calendars now and bring all your burning tire questions to put the fellas on the spot. Oh and I almost forgot, we got Kerry Werner back in the hot seat again to give us the lowdown on what it was like to put the hurt on the world champ Tom Pidcock this past weekend at Little Sugar. He doesn’t come on until about halfway through so make sure to stick around for the action. Last but not least, with the season winding down, we have some exclusive listener question episodes in the cue so if you have any questions or feedback for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). Alright, let’s get this party started already.

 

Big shout of appreciation to our Patreon supporters for helping us keep the mics on. If you want to throw your favorite podcasters a few bones, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). item.title: Episode 68 - The ”Hijacked by Gravel World Champs” Episode
item.itunes:title: Episode 68 - The ”Hijacked by Gravel World Champs” Episode
item.description:
What up party people. Well, the Bonk Bros have failed you all again and what was supposed to be an entire show dedicated to answering y’alls questions got completely hijacked by an extended discussion on the UCI Gravel World Championships from this past weekend. We brought Ignition’s David Van Orsdel on the show who competed in the elite race for team USA alongside the likes of Keegen Swenson, and friends of the pod Alexey Vermeulen and Payson McElveen. So yet again we apologize for pushing  off listener questions but the end of the season is just around the corner which means we will definitely have more Q&A time on tap. Plus, I don’t know about y’all but I’m getting tired of all this Keegen Swenson domination talk and boy howdy can I not wait for there to be more things to discuss on the show. So, if you have any questions or feedback for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). Alright, let’s get this party started already.

 

Big shout of appreciation to our Patreon supporters for helping us keep the mics on. If you want to throw your favorite podcasters a few bones, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). And if you want a sick Bonk Bros dad hat, hit up the link in the show notes (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). item.title: Episode 67 - Will Keegan Swenson Win UCI Gravel World Championships and Did Someone Say Cycling Sandals?
item.itunes:title: Episode 67 - Will Keegan Swenson Win UCI Gravel World Championships and Did Someone Say Cycling Sandals?
item.description:
What is up party people. Wow it seems like quite a while since we’ve had the full crew on the show without any guests, okay well don’t get too excited we still haven’t been able to track Scott down he’s off someone in Euroland smashing ’spressos and housing gazpacho but we did manage to have some fun conversations nonetheless. Despite some big races happening last weekend it seemed like most of the show revolved around the upcoming Gravel World Champs and I can’t even begin to tell you what else. Oh yeah, bike sandals. Anyway, this is normally when I’d tell y’all to send any feedback or questions for the show to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com but we’re honestly so far behind in answering y’alls burning queries that who knows how long it might be before you receive our witty responses. That said, we do have an entire show dedicated to listener questions planned for next week in anticipation there won’t be much race news to talk about, unless good ol’ Keegels runs train on the gravel wannabes this weekend then all bets are off for what’s to come. Alright enough of this intro jazz let’s get this party started. 

 

If you have any questions or feedback for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). 

 

Big shout of appreciation to our Patreon supporters for helping us keep the mics on. If you want to throw your favorite podcasters a few bones, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). item.title: Episode 66 - The RAD Preview and Current State of the Spirit w/ Special Guests Danni Shrosbree and Paige Onweller
item.itunes:title: Episode 66 - The RAD Preview and Current State of the Spirit w/ Special Guests Danni Shrosbree and Paige Onweller
item.description:
What is up party people. Another guest episode for y’all this week and we decided it was time to mix in some estrogen-fueled perspective for the first time in a while. We’ve got Britain’s Danni Shrosbree (@danni_shrosbree) and closet data nerd Paige Onweller (@paigepowered) in the studio with us this week to break down some initial thoughts on this weekend’s LifeTime Grand Prix stop at The RAD and we learn in the process Dylan may be outgunned by Paige when it comes to equipment and strategy analysis so put your propeller caps on for this one!

If you have any questions or feedback for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). 

Big shout of appreciation to our Patreon supporters for helping us keep the mics on. If you want to throw your favorite podcasters a few bones, check that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). item.title: Episode 65 - Chequamegon Recap, Life Time Grand Prix, GC Kuss, and Hot Takes w/ Payson McElveen
item.itunes:title: Episode 65 - Chequamegon Recap, Life Time Grand Prix, GC Kuss, and Hot Takes w/ Payson McElveen
item.description:
What is up party people. First off I want to give a special shout to all the Bonk Bros fans out there who came up to us at the races this past weekend to let us know how much y’all enjoy the show. After all, if it we’re for all of y’all we wouldn’t keep recording these things. Alright we’ve got another banger episode for y’all this week as we brought Payson McElveen (@paysonmcelveen) on the show this week to talk all things Life Time Grand Prix, Chequamegon, crazy international adventures, loads of hot takes, and of course we rant on Sepp Kuss taking the W at the Vuelta last week. So kick back and enjoy the back and forth banter between fellow podcast Jedis for the better part of the next hour. 

 

If you have any questions or feedback for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle @scottmcgilljr).

 

Big shout to our Patreon supporters helping us keep things running. If you too want to support the Bonk Bros hit up that Patreon link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). And if you want a sick Bonk Bros dad hat, hit up the link in the show notes (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). Alright let’s get this party started.

item.title: Episode 64 - Chequamegon Preview w/ Special Guests Alexey Vermeulen and Konny Looser
item.itunes:title: Episode 64 - Chequamegon Preview w/ Special Guests Alexey Vermeulen and Konny Looser
item.description:
What is up party people. Boy do we have a show for y’all today. With Tyler and Scott both unable to record this week we figured what better time to bring a on a guest. So we put up a poll on the Instawaves asking y’all who you wanted to hear on the show this week and taking the top spot was none other than friend of the pod Kerry Werner. Unfortunately, we weren’t able to nail him down as he had some bike build wizardry to conduct before the big Northwoods showdown Saturday but we made up for it with landing not one but TWO guests instead. That’s right, we were joined by Midwest native Alexey Vermeulen (@alexeyvermeulen) and the Swiss beast Konny Looser (@konnylooser). Both of whom are in the LifeTime Grand Prix this season and have had some standout performances in the series so far. So kick back and tune in for a fun conversation with these two on the LTGP, Chequamegon, Vuelta takes, and more in a pseudo Q&A style format.

If you have any feedback or questions for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @raddaddizzle). 

A huge shout to our Patreon supporters helping us keep things running. If you want to get in on the support action head over to the link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). And if you want a sick Bonk Bros dad hat, hit up the link in the show notes (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). item.title: Episode 63 - Gravel Nationals, The Vuelta, Bear Grylls, and Tire Talk
item.itunes:title: Episode 63 - Gravel Nationals, The Vuelta, Bear Grylls, and Tire Talk
item.description:
What is up party people. First off, I want to send a huge shout to all the fans of the show that I ran into this past weekend. It’s always refreshing to hear that people not only tune into the show each week but that it actually provides something of benefit. As I mentioned to the boys on the show this week, I did a little deep dive into our listenership stats last week and found out that Bonk Bros racks up enough downloads each week to place us in the top 1% of all podcasts and we have all of y’all to thank for that. Okay let me get off this high horse so we can get on with the show because we’ve got another fun one for y’all. We talk Vuelta updates, answer loads of listener questions on tires, and give our input on whether Dizzle has a chance at the Stars and Stripes jersey at the inaugural Gravel Natty Champs this weekend.

 

If you have any feedback or questions for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Bonk Bros Instagram page (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). 

 

A big appreciation to our loyal Patreon supporters who help keep our mics running and the Bonk Bros ramblings alive and well. If you want to get in on the support action head over to the link in the show notes (http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros). And if you want a sick Bonk Bros dad hat, hit up the link in the show notes to find our basic merch store (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). Alright let’s get this party started. 

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 62 - Dylan Johnson and The Bonking Buddies
item.itunes:title: Episode 62 - Dylan Johnson and The Bonking Buddies
item.description:
What up party people. This episode is brought to you by Dylan Johnson and The Bonking Buddies, cyclings newest boy band to hit the scene. Tune in to hear more about where the inspiration for this collective sprouted from, as well as some behind the scenes talk from Dizzle on his latest wide-angle podium result at BWR Utah, and more!

If you have any feedback or questions for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Instawaves (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). A huge shout to our loyal Patreon supporters who are have already listened to this episode with the early access pass. If you too want to beat your friends in the weekly Bonk Bros digestion game, head over to http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros . And if you want a sick Bonk Bros dad hat, hit up the link in the show notes to find our basic merch store (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). item.title: Episode 61 - SBTHLLCLMB, Aero Socks, Tires, and News
item.itunes:title: Episode 61 - SBTHLLCLMB, Aero Socks, Tires, and News
item.description:
What is up my party people. The show this week has a bunch of random topics including gravels newest party event the SBT HLLCLMB, team talk, questions about aero socks and tire recos for Iceman, and a whole lot that I can’t remember right now. Oh and Dizzle is making his gravel comeback this weekend at BWR Utah so if you’re out there make sure to give him some hell for his 4 year hiatus from long races on dirt road.

If you have any feedback or questions for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Instawaves (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). item.title: Episode 60 - The Keegan Swenson Leadville Smackdown and Helping Dizzle Find His Special Purpose
item.itunes:title: Episode 60 - The Keegan Swenson Leadville Smackdown and Helping Dizzle Find His Special Purpose
item.description:
What up party people. If you’re not living under a rock, which I assume you aren’t since you’re listening to this show, then you probably have already heard about Keegan Swenson’s record smashing ride from Leadville last weekend. So we figured why not bring you even more gossip about the topic. We base the entire show around listener questions but per usual, there’s heaps of banter mixed in. Oh and don’t forget to stick around to the very end where we talk about helping Dizzle find his special purpose in the big wide world of YouTube creation.

If you have any feedback or questions for the show drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the Insta machine (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). If you’re interested in supporting the show, head over to http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros . And if you want a sick Bonk Bros dad hat, hit up the link in the show notes to find our basic merch store (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). item.itunes:summary:
What up party people. If you’re not living under a rock, which I assume you aren’t since you’re listening to this show, then you probably have already heard about Keegan Swenson’s record smashing ride from Leadville last weekend. So we figured why not bring you even more gossip about the topic. We base the entire show around listener questions but per usual, there’s heaps of banter mixed in. Oh and don’t forget to stick around to the very end where we talk about helping Dizzle find his special purpose in the big wide world of YouTube creation.

item.title: Episode 58 - RAGBRAI, Leadville, and Tyre Talk
item.itunes:title: Episode 58 - RAGBRAI, Leadville, and Tyre Talk
item.description:
What up party people. Quick intro today because I don’t have my mic and I know how much y’all hate poor audio quality. I want to give a shout to all of our Patreon supporters, we’re talking about how we can start putting those funds to good use to help amplify the show (right now we’re just letting the account build up so we have something to work with) so we really do appreciate each dollar you throw our way. This week we’re talking RAGBRAI, Leadville, too much about tires, and a whole bunch of random banter. 

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up on IG or drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). item.title: Episode 57 - Nepomuk Narly, Leadville Geekery, and Listener Questions
item.itunes:title: Episode 57 - Nepomuk Narly, Leadville Geekery, and Listener Questions
item.description:
What up party people. The shows coming out a day or two later than usual this week because the crew is in a million places right now and it was hard to nail down a recording time. Fear not, we sacrificed the first part of our Friday evening just to make sure y’all get what you deserve. We talk Leadville bike setups, my favorite race of the year Nepomuk Narly, and hit a grip of listener questions. 

 

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up on IG or drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). item.title: Episode 55 - US Mountain Bike Nationals, Crusher in the Tushar, and Low Key Dylan Rants w/ Carson Beckett
item.itunes:title: Episode 55 - US Mountain Bike Nationals, Crusher in the Tushar, and Low Key Dylan Rants w/ Carson Beckett
item.description:
What up party people. We had a big weekend of racing to cover with the third round of the Life Time Grand Prix taking place at Crusher in the Tushar, as well as US mountain bike nationals in Pennsylvania, so we decided to rally a guest for the show to give us some of the inside scoop from inside the ropes at mountain bike nats. Carson Beckett, aka the random east coaster, shares his race stories from the XC and STXC races, while Dylan tells us about his race at Crusher, with loads of listener questions and bonus content coming in the second half of the show.

 

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or give us a shout on the socials(@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). If you’re interested in getting your hands on some Bonk Bros merch, check the show notes for links (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). Also, huge shout to all of our loyal Patreon supporters out there. In case you didn’t know, Patrons get early access to shows so if you just can’t wait for that next episode to drop on the public airways, throw the bros a few bones and wabam, early access granted. Alight enough of this intro biz, let’s get this party started.

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 54 - Crusher Preview, Tour Talk, and Extended Listener Questions
item.itunes:title: Episode 54 - Crusher Preview, Tour Talk, and Extended Listener Questions
item.description:
What is up party people. We’ve got another banger extended episode for y’all this week as we’re trying to work our way through the massive backlog of questions y’all have sent in. We get into some Crusher in the Tusher preview, a little bit of Tour talk, and a bunch of listener question banter.

 

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or give us a shout on the socials(@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). ALSO! We’ve got some new merch that we just launched so find those links in the show notes (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). The sampling’s are small to start with but if we start to get some traction then we’ll expand the offerings. Alight, let’s get this party started.

 

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 53 - BWR NC, Migration Gravel Stage Race, Pro Road Nats, Etc
item.itunes:title: Episode 53 - BWR NC, Migration Gravel Stage Race, Pro Road Nats, Etc
item.description:
What is up party people. We are back from our mid-season break and we had a lot of catching up to do. Dylan breaks down his recent race success from BWR NC and Big Horn Gravel, I share some stories from Migration Gravel, Dizzle tells us about his bone-breaking crash at Tulsa and helps us break down the happenings at Pro Road Nats, plus a whole lot of ramblings mixed in.

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or give us a shout on the socials(@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). ALSO! We’ve got some new merch that we just launched so find those links in the show notes (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). The sampling’s are small to start with but if we start to get some traction then we’ll expand the offerings. Alight, let’s get this party started.

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 52 - Unbound, Unbound, and more Unbound
item.itunes:title: Episode 52 - Unbound, Unbound, and more Unbound
item.description:
What is up party people. As you already know from the title of this episode today’s show is all things Unbound talk. We’ve got controversy, hot takes, inside the ropes stories, and more so sit back and tune in. Oh, by the way, this is the last episode for a couple weeks as Adam will be out of pocket for the next two weeks traveling to race the Migration Gravel Stage Race in Kenya, Africa but we promise to get back to our weekly recordings when he’s back. Alright let’s get this party started.

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or give us a shout on the soc meds(@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). ALSO! We’ve got some new merch (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974) that we just launched so find those links in the show notes. The sampling’s are small to start with but if there’s traction early then we’ll expand the offerings. Best of luck to all our loyal listeners out at Unbound, let’s get this party started!

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 50 - Gravel Locos Drama, Transitive Properties, and the Most Listener Questions Ever
item.itunes:title: Episode 50 - Gravel Locos Drama, Transitive Properties, and the Most Listener Questions Ever
item.description:
What up party people. Episode 50 coming atcha this week and boy is it spicy. We’ve got Dizzle Dillman on the for the first part of the show as we banter over the latest gravel drama that went down at Gravel Locos this past weekend. There’s controversy, hot takes, and plenty of Bonk Bros smack talk so stick around for that plus the most listener questions we’ve ever answered at the end. 

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or give us a shout on the soc meds(@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). ALSO! We’ve got some new merch that we just launched (https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/hat-7287 | https://my-store-e1e3c4.creator-spring.com/listing/sticker-3974). The sampling’s are small to start with but if there’s traction early then we’ll expand the offerings. Big shout to all of our loyal Patreon supporters as well. Whether it’s tossing $3 in the tip jar, $5 for early access to shows, $20 for VIP status or more, we appreciate the support in helping keep the mics on. Alright let’s get this Bonk Bros party started.   

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 49 - Gravel Rankings 2.0, Gravel Locos, Rule of 3, and more
item.itunes:title: Episode 49 - Gravel Rankings 2.0, Gravel Locos, Rule of 3, and more
item.description:
What up party people. Shout out to Superfan Daniel for coming in clutch with the Gravel Rankings Gen 2.0 less than a week after we aired the initial list. We break it down and give our thoughts, while also talking some Gravel Locos and Rule of 3 preview, crit beef, Giro drip, and more. Stick around until the end for our predictions on the Gravel Locos podium and Dylan’s take on his own result fate. 

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or on the insta airways (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). Alright let’s get this Bonk Bros party started.   

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 48 - Listener Questions and the Bonk Bros Gravel Rankings?
item.itunes:title: Episode 48 - Listener Questions and the Bonk Bros Gravel Rankings?
item.description:
What up party people. First off I know, I know, Scotts audio sucked even more than usual last week and I apologize. There was an issue with his audio file and that was the best I could do without spending a bazillion hours in the editing software. I hope it’s better for y’all this week as we even did a mic check at the beginning to confirm. Anyway, as promised we reversed the order of the show to knockout some listener question and we off the show with the introduction of a new North American gravel rankings thanks to countless hours of time dedicated to such by our loyalest fan, Daniel. 

 

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or on the insta airways (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). Alright let’s get this Bonk Bros party started.   

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 47 - Frosted Tips, Local Racing, Whiskey 50, Dylan’s Massive Bonk, and Listener Q’s
item.itunes:title: Episode 47 - Frosted Tips, Local Racing, Whiskey 50, Dylan’s Massive Bonk, and Listener Q’s
item.description:
What up party people. We managed to get the full crew in the studio this week and we talk Whiskey 50 and the Keegan/Sofia domestic domination, Tyler’s local racing from this past weekend, how Dylan bonked so hard he couldn’t even finish his ride, and more. 

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or find your way into the insta DMs (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). Alright let’s get this Bonk Bros party started.

item.title: Episode 46 - Sea Otter Recap w/ Kerry Werner
item.itunes:title: Episode 46 - Sea Otter Recap w/ Kerry Werner
item.description:
What up party people. Dylan and I just got back from a whirlwind of a weekend at Sea Otter so we figured we might as well do a show recapping the event. Fortunately, we’ve got none other than Kerry Werner back in the hot seat to help us break it down. This get loose as usual but we do our best to keep it together. Stick around to the end for some fun takes on listener questions. 

If you have any feedback or questions for the show hit us up at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or drop into those insta DMs (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @kerryw24). Alright let’s get this Bonk Bros party started.

item.title: Episode 44 - Speed Round with Scott Plus More Talk on the NCL and Paris Roubaix
item.itunes:title: Episode 44 - Speed Round with Scott Plus More Talk on the NCL and Paris Roubaix
item.description:
What up party people. It’s Friday and we finally got Scott back with us so things get a little loose during this episode. Lots of rambling, uncontrollable laughs, and we even do a listener question speed round with Scott on only gravel questions. We also talk about some of what went down at the first NCL race and Paris Roubaix, both of which took place over the weekend. It’s a long one so sit back and enjoy the ride.

Oh yeah and send any questions or feedback for the show to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the IG DMs (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). Alright let’s get this Bonk Bros party started.

item.title: Episode 43 - NCL, Paris Roubaix, Masters Week, LifeTime Grand Prix, etc.
item.itunes:title: Episode 43 - NCL, Paris Roubaix, Masters Week, LifeTime Grand Prix, etc.
item.description:
What is up party people. For a week that seemed like there wouldn’t be much to talk about, we ended up talking for well over an hour and had some pretty fun discussions. We talk NCL’s inaugural event this weekend in Miami, Paris Roubaix tech talk, speculations on how LifeTime could increase their fan base, a few listener questions, and of course The Masters.

Send any questions or feedback for the show to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the IG DMs (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). Alright let’s get this Bonk Bros party started.

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 42 - Cape Epic Special w/ the Champ Matt Beers
item.itunes:title: Episode 42 - Cape Epic Special w/ the Champ Matt Beers
item.description:
What is up party people. We’ve got a special guest on the show this week which I’m sure you already know about from the title of the episode but in case you haven’t seen, we’ve got Matty Beers in the house fresh off his win at Cape Epic with teammate Chris Blevins. Matt breaks down the racing for us before getting into some Cape Epic Q&A and then we even tackle a few general listener questions at the end.

Send any questions or feedback for the show to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on the IG DMs (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @mattbeers55). Alright let’s get this Bonk Bros party started.

item.title: Episode 40 - The MidSouth and Tattoo Episode w/ Kerry Werner
item.itunes:title: Episode 40 - The MidSouth and Tattoo Episode w/ Kerry Werner
item.description:
What up party people. We’ve got a fun show for y’all this week as we have Kerry Werner in the studio to break down the racing at MidSouth this past weekend where he finished on the podium with 3rd place overall. I wasn’t able to make the recording this week as my son was having surgery at the time the boys were in the studio but Dylan stepped in as show host so let’s just hope he remembered to hit the record button and didn’t just talk about tires the whole time. It sounds like there was a lot of MidSouth discussion, tattoo talk, and some listener questions sprinkled in at the end but you’ll just have to stick around til the end to confirm.

Send any questions you have to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit up our IG DMs (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). Alright let’s get this Bonk Bros party started.   

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 39 - BWR Arizona, XS Gravel, and MidSouth Preview
item.itunes:title: Episode 39 - BWR Arizona, XS Gravel, and MidSouth Preview
item.description:
What is up party people. We got Tyler back in the studio with us this week and seeing as I just got back from BWR Arizona, that seemed like an obvious place to start. We talk about the insanely close finish between Keegan Swenson and Chris Blevins, Sofia’s dominance in the women’s field, and why I chose to participate in the XS gravel movement (shout out Tony Baca) and had a really fun time doing so. Then we get into some MidSouth preview talk as Dylan prepares for his first race of the season down there, before diving into arguably way too many listener questions and targets. But hey, if you stick around through the end of the show you’re welcome for providing you with an extra 20mins of timeless banter this week. 

If you have a question for the show pull up the old email machine and drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com , or you can do a little Instagram stalking to find one of our personal pages and slide your war into those DMs (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). You can also find Dylan at the MidSouth expo this weekend and give him some crap for why you can’t run Pathfinders after he scooped them all up to just lay around in his giant stockpile of gravel tires in his shed. Anyways, if you want to get ahold of us you’ll find a way so let’s get this Bonk Bros party started!

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 38 - BWR Arizona Preview, Pro Racing Mentality, and Dylan’s a Pathfinder Hoarder
item.itunes:title: Episode 38 - BWR Arizona Preview, Pro Racing Mentality, and Dylan’s a Pathfinder Hoarder
item.description:
What up party people. First up, I apologize in advance for any subpar audio quality today. I am down in Arizona for the first Belgian Waffle Ride event of the year and I complete forgot my mic on my desk when I was packing. Luckily, Dylan and Tyler sounded great as usual so they make up for it. We talk BWR, tires (per usual), aero gains, and more so kick back and relax your way through all the latest banter. If you have a question for the show drop a note to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com find one of us on Instagram and slide your war into those DMs (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6). And hey, if you too are down here in Scottsdale for the BWR madness, come find me and say what up. Oh yeah, shout to our newest VIP + Patrons, Ryan and Joel! We appreciate you and all the rest of our show supporters for helping us continue to clog your brains with meaningless tire talk and race banter. Alright, let’s get this party started!

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

And hey, if you too are down here in Scottsdale for the BWR madness, come find me and say what up. Oh yeah, shout to our newest VIP + Patrons, Ryan and Joel! We appreciate you and all the rest of our show supporters for helping us continue to clog your brains with meaningless tire talk and race banter. Alright, let’s get this party started!
Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros
For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow
Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/
item.itunes:author: Bonk Bros

item.title: Episode 37 - Worldwide Gravel Scene, Dylan Rants, and Gear Questions
item.itunes:title: Episode 37 - Worldwide Gravel Scene, Dylan Rants, and Gear Questions
item.description:
Whats up party people. Our recording session got delayed this week for various reasons so this show is coming out a day or two later than usual but hopefully just in time for you to crank up the volume on your Saturday morning group ride and avoid all those awkward pre-season out of breath conversations about who’s fitter than who that everyone dreads this time of year. We’ve got Tyler back with us this week and we talk a lot of gravel nonsense, speculate who’s going to beat who at MidSouth, and answer some gear related listener questions, and more. If you have a question for the show and you were born before the 90’s then send us an email at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com otherwise hit us up on the Instagram machine (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6). Or if you’re going to be at BWR Arizona or MidSouth then find and give a shout. Alright let’s get this bonk bros party started!

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 36 - Aero Gains, Gravel Questions, and Scott Found a Hotdog in his Knee
item.itunes:title: Episode 36 - Aero Gains, Gravel Questions, and Scott Found a Hotdog in his Knee
item.description:
What. Is. up. party people! Lots of rambling this week as Dylan, Scott, and I all catch up a bit on the latest happenings in our own life before getting into some racing topics and listener questions. Speaking of listener questions, if you have that burning desire to submit a question for the show drop a note to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on Instagram (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6). If you’re listening to this episode and it’s still Thursday, February 16th, then that means you’re part of the exclusive early release club and we thank you for your continued support on Patreon. If that’s not you, well, we still appreciate you tuning in to our weekly ramblings of who knows what. Probably tires or gravel or something else that annoys Scott to the point of tuning out. Alright alright let’s get this bonk bros party started!

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros

item.title: Episode 35 - Cyclocross World Champs Etc.
item.itunes:title: Episode 35 - Cyclocross World Champs Etc.
item.description:
What up party people! I am back to my normal self after a brutal bout of illness and we’re bringing you a mega show this week to make up for the day or two delay. We get pretty deep into cyclocross world champs, USAC scheduling Nats the same day as a Life Time Grand Prix race, and a ton of listener questions to boot. If you have any feedback or questions for the show send those to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on Instagram (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). Thanks to all of our Patreon supporters for helping us keep the mics on. Alright let’s get this bonk bros party started!

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 34 - The Call of a Life Time and Tyre Girth
item.itunes:title: Episode 34 - The Call of a Life Time and Tyre Girth
item.description:
What up party people! Just the original three Bonk Bros on the show this week and we talk Life Time’s new docuseries, "Call of a Life Time," what’s the best tire girth for mild gravel racing, and more. All show feedback and questions can be sent to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on Instagram (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @dizzledillman). Thanks again to our loyal Patreon supporters and special shout to the latest listener to join the $8/mo club, Tweikelburg (sorry, that’s all the information provided). Alright let’s get this bonk bros party started!

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros

item.title: Episode 33 - If Three’s Company and Four’s a Crowd, What’s Five?
item.itunes:title: Episode 33 - If Three’s Company and Four’s a Crowd, What’s Five?
item.description:
What up party people! Scott’s back from his training camp hiatus and since he’s based out of Girona now, the only time he could record was in the middle of the day. SO I lobbed it out there to the other fellas to see if anyone else could make it work and all of a sudden, we had five of us in the studio and things were getting weird quick. We talked euro racing, Scott’s engagement, and knocked out a LOT of listener questions which means we’re slowly chipping away at the massive cue we have backlogged. So let us know, is five guys too much to handle or did y’all still dig? Send show feedback and questions to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on Instagram (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti @dizzledillman). Thanks again to our loyal Patreon supporters, helping us keep it real while keeping us out of the Ramen aisle. Alright let’s get this bonk bros party started!

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros  

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 32 - The Fate of the Bike Industry and We Called It!
item.itunes:title: Episode 32 - The Fate of the Bike Industry and We Called It!
item.description:
What up party people! We’ve got Tyler back on the show this week and we planned on banging out a bunch of listener questions the whole time but somehow we ended up talking about a bunch of random stuff before we even got to the first question. Fear not though, we entered rapid fire mode and knocked out a handful in lickity split. If you have any questions or show feedback, send those to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on Instagram (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). I want to give a big shout to our loyal Patrons, y’all are greatly appreciated. Alright let’s get this bonk bros party started!

item.title: Episode 31 - How Much Gravel Talk is too Much Gravel Talk?
item.itunes:title: Episode 31 - How Much Gravel Talk is too Much Gravel Talk?
item.description:
What up party people! Scott’s out this week but we brought Tyler Cloutier back on for an endless discussion on gravel. We hit a couple listener questions that slightly deviate from gravel but just barely. We really enjoy having Tyler on the show and we hope y’all feel the same. All questions and feedback for the show can be sent to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on Instagram (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6 @tylerclouti). Oh and a big shout to our loyal Patrons. A little bit goes a long ways, especially when you’re starting from nothing. Alright as Dizzle Dillman would say, let’s jump this shark and get this bonk bros party started!

item.title: Episode 30 - Holiday Hangover
item.itunes:title: Episode 30 - Holiday Hangover
item.description:
What up party people! New Year same us whether you like it or not. Just the original crew today and it’s a good thing we didn’t have much bike racing to talk about this week because we answered a boat load of y’alls questions from the last few weeks.

Scott’s headed to Euroland next week to meet his new teammates so we’ll probably get a guest or two on over the next few weeks until he’s able to get back on the pod again. If you have any suggestions for guests you’d like to see on the show, give us a shout and we’ll see what we can make happen. All questions and feedback for the show can be sent to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com or hit us up on Instagram (@bonkbros @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6).

Oh yeah, we talk briefly about our Patreon during the show today so just want to give a big shout to our loyal Patrons. I know it seems like this podcast thing is easy because you can stream any of the millions of podcasts to your phone at any time but to quote my homie Gucci Mane, stuntin ain’t nothin, and there’s real dollars and time that goes into these things so we really appreciate all the support. Alright enough is enough lets get this bonk bros party started!

 

Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros 

 

For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

 

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com: https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

I know it seems like this podcast thing is easy because you can stream any of the millions of podcasts to your phone at any time but to quote my homie Gucci Mane, stuntin ain’t nothin, and there’s real dollars and time that goes into these things so we really appreciate all the support. Alright enough is enough lets get this bonk bros party started!
Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros
For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 27 - The Show That Almost Didn’t Happen
item.itunes:title: Episode 27 - The Show That Almost Didn’t Happen
item.description:
What up party people! It took us a while to get our ducks in a row this week and we almost ended up scrapping the recording altogether BUT we managed to salvage some moderately digestible content for y’all. We talk cyclocross nationals predictions, who will win between Scott and Drew, Scott’s LifeTime Grand Prix application that he filled out while on the air, and a few listener questions. For some reason I thought we had more questions queued up so if we somehow misplaced yours or you have more questions or feedback for the show you can find us on the instagram machine at @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson @dizzledillman and @adamsaban6 OR hit us up on the @bonkbros page. You can also drop a note to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com. Alright let’s get the bonk bros party started!

http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros 

 

For more Dylan Johnson content:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 25 - 2023 Life Time Grand Prix Hot Takes
item.itunes:title: Episode 25 - 2023 Life Time Grand Prix Hot Takes
item.description:
What up my party people! The holiday season is among us and we’ve got all sorts of things coming up in the near future. We’re not quite ready to talk about any of it just yet but gotta keep all of y’all on your toes somehow. So the day after we recorded last week Life Time released their 2023 Grand Prix plans andddd we have some initial thoughts we talk through here. That was all before Scott joined since he was over gravel before it even started so we saved his commentary for the smattering of listener questions we had this week. Oh yeah and shout to our boy Dizzle Dillman who wrecked himself at Day 2 of the NCGP this weekend, heal up soon homie. If you have any feedback or questions for the show you can find us on the gram at @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6 OR hit us up on the show page @bonkbros. You can also drop a note to bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com. Alright let’s get this Bonk Bros party started!

item.description:
What up my party people! We’ve got Scott back in the house tonight after a long hiatus and we also had Dizzle Dillman join us halfway through the recording so things got way off the rails as usual. We literally just got done recording this and I honestly don’t even remember what all we covered other than I know there was a lot of talk about tires. I’m sure we touched on bike racing at least once or twice but guess you’ll just have to stick around to find out. item.title: Episode 21 - Big Sugar Madness and Drizzle Won a C1?!
item.itunes:title: Episode 21 - Big Sugar Madness and Drizzle Won a C1?!
item.description:
What up party people. As you can tell, I lost my voice after racing Big Sugar last weekend so I apologize if you’re ready to rip your ears off after listening to my raspy voice for the next hour and a half. Dylan and I both raced the final stage of the LifeTime Grand Prix this weekend and share a few stories from the ride. Then, Drew Dizzle Dillman tells us about how he won not one but two cross races this past weekend including a C1. If you have any feedback or questions for the show you can find us on the gram at @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6 OR head over to the brand new show page @bonkbros. We also have an email now so if that’s more your jam drop us a note at bonkbrospodcast@gmail.com. 

Patreon:

http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros 

 

For more Dylan Johnson content:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 20 - BWR Kansas and Big Sugar Preview w/ the Jukebox Squad
item.itunes:title: Episode 20 - BWR Kansas and Big Sugar Preview w/ the Jukebox Squad
item.description:
What up party people. This weeks show is a bit of a doozy as the whole thing was recorded in-person. Normally we record these episodes from remote locations so doing things in person complicates the audio setup a little bit so bear with us as we kick back with  Ashton Lambie and Adam Roberge of the Jukebox Gravel squad to talk BWR Kansas, Big Sugar, and the spirit of gravel. If you have any feedback or questions for the show you can find us on the gram at @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6.

item.title: Episode 19 - Gravel World Champs, and BWR Michigan, and Waterloo World Cup, Oh My!
item.itunes:title: Episode 19 - Gravel World Champs, and BWR Michigan, and Waterloo World Cup, Oh My!
item.description:
What’s up party people. We’ve got another monster episode for y’all today. Dizzle Dillman’s back in the hot seat and we’re talking UCI Gravel World Championships, Belgian Waffle Ride Michigan, Waterloo World Cup (Trek CX Cup), the most legendary of legends races, and a whole lot more so stick around til the end to hear all the banter. Send any feedback and questions for the show to @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6 on the ol’  Instamachine.

item.title: Episode 18 - The Gravel vs Cyclocross Show
item.itunes:title: Episode 18 - The Gravel vs Cyclocross Show
item.description:
What’s up party people! This episode was a late night recording so don’t be surprised when things get a little off track. Scott’s on vacation, it was way past Dylan’s bed time, and I do my best to keep things rolling. We also have a mid-show guest appearance so stick around to find out who. We talk UCI Gravel World Championships where Matthieu Van Der Poel will line up with other World Tour stars like Peter Sagan, Nikki Terpstra, and many more, Charm City Cyclocross, Keegan Swenson World Tour contract speculation, and even hit a few listener questions at the end including a very interesting take on how to better your chances at gaining points for the Pure Gravel Power Rankings. For questions and show feedback, slide into our insta DMs at @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6 . 

Patreon:

http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros 

 

For more Dylan Johnson content:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

 

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com - https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 17 - Road World Championships Etc.
item.itunes:title: Episode 17 - Road World Championships Etc.
item.description:
What’s up party people! Back by popular demand our very own Scott McGill has returned from his epic journey to race World Champs last week where he ripped the early break for 200k and then drank beer hands while riding one handed wheelies on the final climb after dropping off the front group. Stay tuned to hear all about it and a whole lot of other random banter. 

If you have any questions or feedback for the show, find us on the Instagram airwaves and drop into our DMs so we can get ya qued up for the next show. IG handles are @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6

item.title: Episode 16 - Chequamegon Recap w/ Midwest Pros Jenna Rinehart and Josh Bauer
item.itunes:title: Episode 16 - Chequamegon Recap w/ Midwest Pros Jenna Rinehart and Josh Bauer
item.description:
What up party people. First off we want to give a big shout to everyone we ran into this past weekend at the Chequamegon MTB fest who let us know how much y’all are enjoying the show. It’s super cool to hear that real people are tuning in each week to listen to us bone heads shoot the breeze about the latest happenings in the world bike racing and that definitely got us hyped. So this week we decided to mix it up a bit since our boy Scott is at World Champs, and instead of covering all the latest race news we decided it would be fun to do a big Chequamegon recap episode. To add some color to the conversation we recruited a couple Midwest icons to come on and share their thoughts of this years race so stay tuned to hear from previous winner, Jenna Reinhart (@jzrinehart), and this years Lutsen 99er winner the one and only Josh Bauer (@boshjauer). 

If you have any questions or feedback for the show, find us on the Instagram airwaves and drop into our DMs so we can get ya qued up for the next show. IG handles are @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6

Patreon:

http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros 

 

For more Dylan Johnson content:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

 

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com - https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/
