item.title: Episode 15 - Chequamegon Preview and Scott’s Going to World Champs!
item.itunes:title: Episode 15 - Chequamegon Preview and Scott’s Going to World Champs!
item.description:
What up party people. This weeks show is a little different than usual because our home boy Scotty McG is headed to worlds so the first half of the show is us catching up with him before he boarded his flight to the land of Oz. Then, Dylan and I sat down with the Chequamegon reining womens champion Melisa Rollins to talk all things Chequamegon. 

If you have any questions or feedback for the show, find us on the Instagram airwaves and drop into our DMs so we can get ya qued up for the next show. IG handles are @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6

item.title: Episode 14 - Maryland Cycling Classic, Dakota Five-O, and the end of an era
item.itunes:title: Episode 14 - Maryland Cycling Classic, Dakota Five-O, and the end of an era
item.description:
What up party people! We’ve got another guest on the show this week. Hugo Scala joined us to break down the happenings at the inaugural Maryland Cycling Classic this past weekend. He and Scott both raced for the National team as they took on a handful of World Tour Teams to fight for the overall. Adam is fresh off racing the Dakota Five-O which was a big goal so he breaks that down for y’all and then we touch on the end of the Shenandoah 100 era. Some people are just out to ruin it for the rest of us. If you have any questions or feedback for the show, find us on the Instagram airwaves and drop into our DMs so we can get ya qued up for the next show. IG handles are @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6

item.title: Episode 13 - Triumph and Tragedy
item.itunes:title: Episode 13 - Triumph and Tragedy
item.description:
What up party people! We’ve got an episode filled with highs and lows today. We start off covering the tragic loss of Sule Kangangi who suffered severe injuries from a crash while racing the Vermont Overland. Sule was stateside for a 1 month block of racing as the leader of Team Amani from East Africa. Sule’s teammates, John Kariuki and Jordan Schleck went on to finish first and third in the event in honor of their dear friend. Then we covered some more highs and lows that took place at Mountain Bike World Championships including Chris Blevins crashing out in the final moment while trying to defend his short track world champion title, Tom Pidcock crashing out of contention in the cross country race and Nino Scheurter winning his 10th world champion title. If you have any questions of feedback for the show, find us on the Instagram airwaves and drop into our DMs so we can get ya qued up for the next show. IG handles are @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6 

Patreon:

http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros 

 

For more Dylan Johnson content:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

 

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com - https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

Sule was stateside for a 1 month block of racing as the leader of Team Amani from East Africa. Sule’s teammates, John Kariuki and Jordan Schleck went on to finish first and third in the event in honor of their dear friend. Then we covered some more highs and lows that took place at Mountain Bike World Championships including Chris Blevins crashing out in the final moment while trying to defend his short track world champion title, Tom Pidcock crashing out of contention in the cross country race and Nino Scheurter winning his 10th world champion title. If you have any questions of feedback for the show, find us on the Instagram airwaves and drop into our DMs so we can get ya qued up for the next show. IG handles are @scottmcgilljr @dylanjawnson and @adamsaban6
Patreon: http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros
For more Dylan Johnson content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

item.title: Episode 12 - Gravel Worlds, Doping, and Swiss Epic Stories w/ Carson Beckett
item.itunes:title: Episode 12 - Gravel Worlds, Doping, and Swiss Epic Stories w/ Carson Beckett
item.description:
What up party people! We’ve got another fun one for y’all today. Friend of the pod Carson Beckett joined us to break down the latest happenings in the world of bike racing. We talk tandem life at Gravel Worlds, doping scandals in both the road and off road scene, and Carson gives us some insight from his recent trip to race Swiss Epic. item.title: Episode 10 - All Things Leadville w/ Jeremiah Bishop
item.itunes:title: Episode 10 - All Things Leadville w/ Jeremiah Bishop
item.description:
What up party people! Welcome back to episode 10 of the Bonk Bros podcast. This week we are covering all things Leadville. If you’ve been living under a rock your whole life or maybe you’re just not into racing mountain bikes, the Leadville Trail 100 is one of the oldest, hardest, and highest 100 mile off road bike races in the US, heck maybe the world. I’ve personally completed the race one time in 2017 and I’m stoked to get back there this year. With the LifeTime Grand Prix adopting this legendary race into their series, we figured it was only fitting to get our FIRST guest on the show who caries a rich history with this race himself. That’s right, we’ve got special guest Jeremiah Bishop on the air for this episode and have some good fun breaking down the past and future of Leadville. Stick around to the end to hear some bonus content after we wrap up our Leadville talk.

No listener questions this week because we just didn’t quite have the chance to fit those in but we promise to get those questions answered on next weeks show, and hopefully more. If you have any Leadville-specific questions or any questions in general, send those to @adamsaban6 or @dylanjawnson on Instagram. We’re giving Scott a break for this week because he’s over the pond throwing down in some big stage race or something. 

If you want to follow JB on the socials, find him @Jeremiah_bishop_mtb_ and https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC06EUDqkDCZ6hcxtKm7JQYw

Patreon:

http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros 

 

For more Dylan Johnson content:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

 

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com - https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 9 - Snowshoe World Cup, Leadville, and More
item.itunes:title: Episode 9 - Snowshoe World Cup, Leadville, and More
item.description:
What up party people! Just a quick intro today because the show this week actually went quite a bit longer than usual and I want to get y’all into the good stuff. Lots of mountain bike talk this week as we cover some of the Snowshoe World Cup racing, speculate what might go down at Leadville next week, and answer a couple listener questions. Speaking of, next week we’re going to do a Leadville preview show and we’d love to answer any preliminary questions y’all have for us. Dylan and I will both be taking to the start line and if there’s ever a race that gets people going, this is it. So bring the heat people. Head over to the Instamachine, give us a follow, and slide into our DMs @scottmcgilljr @adamsaban6 or @dylanjawnson. item.title: Episode 8 - MTB Nationals and The Best Gravel Race You’ve Never Heard Of
item.itunes:title: Episode 8 - MTB Nationals and The Best Gravel Race You’ve Never Heard Of
item.description:
What up party people! Welcome back to the Bonk Bros podcast. This week we kick things off with MTB Nationals that took place this past weekend in Winter Park, CO. There were some surprising and not-so-surprising results that we cover. None of us were there or even had the chance to catch up with anyone who was and to add chaos to the matter the Flobikes coverage was kinda spotty. So all of our takes are from a birds eye view, mostly looking through Insta feeds and results sheets. After that I get into some breakdown of the Nepomuk Narly 100. What’s that, you’ve never heard of the Nepomuk Narly before? Yeah, neither had I but I’m sure glad I found out about it before race day because this was an experience I will never forget. Not only did I get to spend the first half of the race in the early break with gravel legend Adam Roberge, who by the way is just as class act as they come, but the off-the-bike experience is what truly set this race apart. Pre-race snacks, plenty of neutral aid stations, post-race activities for the whole family including food trucks, train rides, bouncy houses, and a street dance to end the night. Put this one on your calendar folks, big things are coming for the small town of Pisek, ND (Check out Adam Roberge's recap video for more! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wOFh2RnzZ9Q). We round out the show with some entertaining listener questions so stick around til the end for that. And please keep those questions coming, they truly add some pleasant color to each episode and we love hearing from y’all. Until we get the Bonk Bros socials going just hop onto the Instagram machine and drop those questions into our DMs @scottmcgilljr @adamsaban6 or @dylanjawnson on Instagram. Alright that’s it for the intro, let’s get this bonk bros party started!

Follow along on the soc meds and give us a five-star review if you feel so inclined (if not, just don't even bother). @dylanjawnson @scottmcgilljr @adamsaban6

Patreon:

http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com - https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 7 - Crit Beef and MTB Thief
item.itunes:title: Episode 7 - Crit Beef and MTB Thief
item.description:
In case you’ve been living under a rock and haven’t seen the brawl that broke out this past weekend at the American Crit Cup round in Salt Lake City between Legion and Best Buddies, just type some words into the Google machine and I’m sure you’ll find any number of memes and remixes of the incident. Anyways, that’s the main topic for the show today and we get into it after Scott talks about his crazy experience at the UCI XC race he went to in Canada. Stick around until the end to hear some inside criterium talk as we have our first guest appearance on the show. Oh yeah and keep the questions coming. Send those to @scottmcgilljr @adamsaban6 or @dylanjawnson on Instagram. Soon enough we’ll be legit and have our own Bonk Bros soc meds but for now this is what we’ve got.

item.title: Episode 5 - Armstrong Apprehended and What The Helmet is Going On at The Tour?
item.itunes:title: Episode 5 - Armstrong Apprehended and What The Helmet is Going On at The Tour?
item.description:
We start this show off with a bit of an emotional discussion around the murder case of Mo Wilson, the rising off-road pro who was shot and killed in May by alleged suspect, Kaitlin Armstrong. The latest updates aren't all somber as Armstrong was apprehended in Costa Rica last week and brought back to US where she remains in custody. Then we get into some banter about the latest gear being showcased at The Tour. 

Follow along on the soc meds and give us a five-star review if you feel so inclined (if not, just don't even bother). @dylanjawnson @scottmcgilljr @adamsaban6

 

Patreon:

http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

 

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com - https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/

item.title: Episode 3 - The Life Time Grand Prix
item.itunes:title: Episode 3 - The Life Time Grand Prix
item.description:
This week the fellas sat down to cover the race series that has swept the nation by storm this year, The Life Time Grand Prix. Dylan was one of the fortunate select few to have been invited into this season-long professional off-road series, while Scott and Adam have been follow along from afar. All three offer some interesting takes on how the series has been perceived in its inaugural season and how they feel it could be improved. In true Bonk Bros fashion, none of this discussion was scripted beforehand so sit back and come along for the ride because it's about to get bumpy.

Follow along on the soc meds and give us a five-star review if you feel so inclined (if not, just don't even bother). @dylanjawnson @scottmcgilljr @adamsaban6

Patreon:

item.title: Episode 2 - Tulsa Tough, the hardest BWR, and rider safety
item.itunes:title: Episode 2 - Tulsa Tough, the hardest BWR, and rider safety
item.description:
This week the crew sat down to cover a couple of the biggest races that took place this past weekend domestically. While none of us were there, Scott followed closely as the crit battles unfolded at Tulsa Tough including crashes, chaos, and rider safety concerns. Then, Dylan and Scott both provide some firsthand takes on the BWR Asheville race that had no shortage of drama of its own. 

Follow along on the soc meds and give us a five-star review if you feel so inclined (if not, just don't even bother). @dylanjawnson @scottmcgilljr @adamsaban6

Patreon:

item.title: Episode 1 - The Last Hard Crit and Proverbial World Championship of Gravel
item.itunes:title: Episode 1 - The Last Hard Crit and Proverbial World Championship of Gravel
item.description:
Welcome to the newest, freshest, and hottest cycling podcast to drop onto the scene hosted by Adam Saban, Scott McGill, and Dylan Johnson. Collectively known as the Bonk Bros. Each week these knuckleheads bring you a fresh take on all the latest happenings in the world of bike racing. This first episode brings you an inside perspective from the Armed Forces Cycling Classic (or as Scott refers to it "The Last Hard Crit") as Scott recaps his racing from the weekend. Then, things get real spicy when Dylan goes into some behind the scenes drama from the proverbial World Championship of Gravel, also known as the Unbound 200, that took place over the weekend. Tune in and get ready to feel the heat!

Follow along on the soc meds and give us a five-star review if you feel so inclined (if not, just don't even bother). @dylanjawnson @scottmcgilljr @adamsaban6

Patreon:

http://patreon.com/patreon_bonkbros 

 

For more Dylan Johnson content:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIf1xvRN8pzyd_VfLgj_dow

 

Intro/ Outro music by AlexGrohl on Pixabay.com - https://pixabay.com/music/id-111445/
